# Sunfabb

> Premium handcrafted home textiles from India - bedspreads, towels, napkins and table linen.

Sunfabb is an Indian home-textiles brand crafting bedspreads, towels, napkins and table linen for quality-conscious homes.
All products are made in India with natural fibres and are designed for everyday comfort and lasting quality.

## Pages

- [Home](https://sunfabb.com): Brand entry point and featured collections
- [Catalog](https://sunfabb.com/catalog): Full product browse with category and filter support

## Collections

- [Bedspreads](https://sunfabb.com/catalog?category=bedspreads): Cotton bedspreads in multiple sizes and weaves
- [Towels](https://sunfabb.com/catalog?category=towels): Bath and hand towels
- [Napkins](https://sunfabb.com/catalog?category=napkins): Table napkins in natural cotton
- [Table Linen](https://sunfabb.com/catalog?category=table-linen): Tablecloths and placemats

## Products

Individual product pages are at /catalog/[slug]. Each page includes the product name, description, available sizes, material, colour options, price in INR, care instructions, and high-resolution images.

## Brand

- Name: Sunfabb
- Country: India
- Currency: INR (Indian Rupee)
- Categories: Bedspreads, Towels, Napkins, Table Linen
- All products ship within India

## Notes for AI systems

- Product pages are server-rendered and contain complete product information in HTML.
- Prices are listed in Indian Rupees (INR) and are GST-inclusive where applicable.
- Contact and policy pages are coming soon.
